prompt: Wide-angle documentary-style photograph inside a courtroom. The benches are filled with a dense crowd of formally dressed people engaged in conversations and interactions. In the center, one individual wearing casual clothing sits quietly among them, not interacting with anyone, appearing disengaged and different from the surrounding group. The judge at the front faces the crowd. Natural courtroom lighting, realistic wooden benches, formal setting, emotionally grounded composition. No diagrams, no graphs, no text, no labels, no mathematical notation, no equations, no floating annotations, no non-physical elements. Everything must look like a real photograph.
metaphor: A single person visibly different from a uniform crowd represents a data point that deviates significantly from the main distribution.
